rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract content.
generic_rules: For component type contracts, place input assumptions and output guarantees only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Ensure AGREE expression types match AADL types (bool, int, real) and avoid AADL property names as AGREE variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee declarations, equation definitions, and assignment statements within annex agree blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties not directly exposed as typed ports or constants
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst specific component extraction rules
